\tzpentry{ID4171}{Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4171 introduces Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Delta P = P_{\text{rear}} - P_{\text{front}}, \quad \text{with} \quad P_{\text{electro}} = \frac{1}{2}\varepsilon_0 E^2 \]
